titleStmt.title: SII 26.466: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 466. (A.R. No. 443 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌAIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Māṟaº Vira Pāṇḍya (?): Kollam 616, Āṉi 4, śu. 11, Wednesday, Svātī, = 1441 A.D. May 31.

summary.p: This inscription records that the services of reciting the holy hymns and the provision of a flower-hall in the temple of the god Mūṉṟīśvaramuḍaiyanayinār of Ambalattāḍinallūr alias Maṇappaḍaivīḍū in the north-eastern quarter of Śrīvallavaṉmaṅgalam, a brahmadēśam, in Kīḻkaḷak-kūṟṟam, were arranged to be the proprietory right of the 15 circles (of the temple) by the Bhikshā-maṭha. It states that the privileges accuring therefrom were to be enjoyed by Uyyaneṟikāṭṭiṉar Vaṉattuvāḷvittār, a disciple of Āgamaśīladēvar alias Umaiyorupāgar of the lineage of the Bhikshā-maṭhā, and his successors. (cf: No. 471 below).

The signatories were Śrīkaiyilāyamuḍaiyāṉ-bhaṭṭaṉ Aṉavaratadāṉapperumāḷ of the temple, Tirunelvēliuḍaiyār, Veṟṟikkuvēleḍutta Perumāḷ Irāśakumāra-bhaṭṭaṉ, Aṟamvaḷattār, Krēntīśvaramuḍaiyāṉ Mūṉṟīśvara-bhaṭṭaṉ Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira Śīkaraṇattāṉ, Māttāṇḍāṉ-perumāḷ alias Villavarāyaṉ, the temple trustee, and Nāṇambi Ayyaṉ Villavarāsar the siṟpi (sculptor), of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ādicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam . kollam 6 100 10 6 varuṣam Āṉi mātam 4 nāḷ pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādeśiyum putavāramum peṟṟa cotināḷ kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu bramadeśam
śrīvallavaṉmaṅkalattu vaṭakiḻ piṭākai Ampalattāṭinallūrāṉa maṇappaṭaiviṭṭil Uṭaiyār muṉṟiśvaramuṭaiyanayinār koyilil tiruppāṭṭum Oti Ik koyilil
tiruppūmaṇṭamum patiṉañcu vaṭṭam kāṇi Āṭccaiyākak kaṟpittuk kuṭutta bhikṣāmaṭha san=tatiyil Āgamaśiladevarāṉa Umaiyorupākar śiṣyarkaḷil Uyyaneṟikāṭṭiṉār vaṉattu vāḻvittārku Iṉṉāyi
ṉār koyilil Immaricāti Uḷḷa kāṇiāṭcaiyum kaiyyāṇṭu turamuñceytu Itukku Uḷḷa Uṭaimaiyum peṟṟu pala viśeṣa nivataṅkaḷukku Uḷḷa peṟu peṟum peṟṟu Immaricāti Uḷḷa kāṇiāṭcaiyum turamum
Iṉṉāḷ mutal san=tati praveśame kaiyāṇṭu potumpaṭi kalluveṭṭik kuṭuttamaikku Ikkoyil śrīkaiyilāyamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Aṉavaratatāṉapperumāḷ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku meṟpaṭi tirunelveli Uṭaiyār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku veṟṟikkuveleṭuttaperumāḷ Irācakumārapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkuaṟam vaḷattār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
krentiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ muṉṟiśvarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nāṟpatteṇṇāyira cikaraṇattāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ikkoyilil taṉmakattā marattāṇṭaṉ perumāḷāṉa villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivvūril ciṟpikaḷil nāṇampi Ayyaṉ villavarācār Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.466 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
